prompt: I need a case study for a client project. We built a real-time inventory dashboard for a retail chain called StockWise. It pulls data from their POS systems, Shopify, and warehouse scanners, runs demand forecasting with a lightweight ML model, and shows low-stock alerts and reorder recommendations. Built by NexusPoint for StockWise. Tech: Python, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Redis for caching. It processes about 50,000 inventory movements per day and reduced stockouts by 34% in the first month. The dashboard updates every 30 seconds. Make it a case study.
